summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Renewal Guide webpage. Fixed critical slider functionality bug and verified all features working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Slider markers were not clickable - missing onClick handlers

passed_tests: Rent input field accepts custom values and updates calculations
Escalation input field accepts custom percentage values
Lock-in slider has 4 discrete options (No lock-in, 6 months, 9 months, 11 months)
Slider snaps to discrete values and updates UI when changed
Discount calculations: No lock-in = 0%, 6 months = 30%, 9 months = 40%, 11 months = 50%
New monthly rent calculation: Current Rent + Escalation - Discount on Escalation
Total savings over 11 months displayed correctly (discount amount × 11)
Edge cases handled (zero rent, zero escalation)
